message:
feat(connectors): add Copilot CLI connector for `gh copilot` event logs

Implement a new CopilotCliConnector that discovers and parses GitHub
Copilot CLI (`gh copilot`) session data, separate from the existing
CopilotConnector which handles VS Code Copilot Chat JSON files.

The CLI connector supports multiple storage formats and locations:
- JSONL event logs in ~/.copilot/session-state/{session-id}/events.jsonl
  (v2 format, since Copilot CLI 0.0.342)
- Legacy single-JSON session files in ~/.copilot/history-session-state/
- gh extension config/history in ~/.config/gh-copilot/ and
  ~/.config/gh/copilot/
- XDG data directory at ~/.local/share/github-copilot/

Key implementation details:
- Parses both JSONL (line-delimited events) and single-JSON documents
- Extracts messages from multiple event type naming conventions
  (user.message, userPromptSubmitted, prompt, etc.)
- Supports content in various field names (message, content, text,
  value, prompt, output, result)
- Extracts timestamps from multiple field name conventions
- Falls back to parent directory name as session ID when not in data
- Includes 14 comprehensive unit tests covering JSONL parsing, legacy
  JSON, malformed input handling, scan roots, since_ts filtering,
  multi-session discovery, and path detection heuristics

Integration changes:
- Register copilot_cli module in connectors/mod.rs
- Add slug mappings: "copilot_cli", "copilot-cli", "gh-copilot"
- Register factory entry for connector instantiation
- Export CopilotCliConnector from lib.rs public API
- Add to KNOWN_CONNECTORS list and canonical_connector_slug mapping
- Configure default probe roots and tilde-expanded probe paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
